PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, JASPER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB CO., C/O DL GLAZE CO., INC LAZERMAN, MARK $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,000.00, STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF. CLAIM OF CROSS-COMPLAINANT LUXOR CAB IS DENIED.
